window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: Morocco and UAE sign a declaration for a multidimensional partnership including high-speed rail financing in December 2023.
evidence.snippet: UAE and Morocco signed a massive joint declaration detailing extensive financial and investment support for Morocco's railway projects.

evidence.claim: Masdar enters consortium to develop the 800 MW Noor Midelt II solar project in Morocco in late 2024.
evidence.snippet: Masdar secured participation in the consortium managing Morocco's next-phase Noor Midelt II concentrated solar power complex.

evidence.claim: AD Ports Group negotiates a management concession for the Nador West Med port terminal in November 2024.
evidence.snippet: AD Ports Group advanced technical discussions to develop and operate terminals at the Nador West Med industrial port complex.

evidence.claim: ADFD commits $1 billion to co-finance Morocco's infrastructure projects ahead of the 2030 World Cup in January 2025.
evidence.snippet: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development committed $1 billion in sovereign financing to upgrade Moroccan sports, airport, and transit infrastructure.

evidence.claim: EDGE Group signs an agreement to supply advanced defense systems to the Royal Moroccan Armed Forces in July 2024.
evidence.snippet: EDGE Group finalized a procurement and technology transfer contract to supply Morocco with electronic warfare systems.

evidence.claim: G42 partners with Moroccan research centers to launch a local Arabic LLM AI model in October 2024.
evidence.snippet: G42 announced a collaboration with Morocco's UM6P university to research and deploy custom Arabic large language models.

evidence.claim: Mubadala explores investments in Morocco's green hydrogen and ammonia production plants in February 2025.
evidence.snippet: Mubadala Energy initiated feasibility studies to develop green hydrogen and clean shipping fuel production facilities in northern Morocco.

evidence.claim: The Morocco-Nigeria gas pipeline project receives $100 million in feasibility study funding from ADFD in mid-2024.
evidence.snippet: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development authorized a $100 million grant to support engineering and environmental assessments of the pipeline.

evidence.claim: DP World announces plans for a major logistics free zone in Casablanca by late 2025.
evidence.snippet: DP World announced intention to construct a smart logistics and warehousing park near Casablanca to streamline import-export flows.

evidence.claim: OCP Group and ADNOC strengthen their sulfur supply agreement to support global fertilizer production in June 2025.
evidence.snippet: ADNOC extended its long-term sulfur supply partnership with Morocco's OCP, cementing agricultural supply security and trade pipelines.

edges.claim: Morocco and UAE sign a declaration for a multidimensional partnership including high-speed rail financing in December 2023.
Masdar enters consortium to develop the 800 MW Noor Midelt II solar project in Morocco in late 2024.
AD Ports Group negotiates a management concession for the Nador West Med port terminal in November 2024.
ADFD commits $1 billion to co-finance Morocco's infrastructure projects ahead of the 2030 World Cup in January 2025.
EDGE Group signs an agreement to supply advanced defense systems to the Royal Moroccan Armed Forces in July 2024.
G42 partners with Moroccan research centers to launch a local Arabic LLM AI model in October 2024.
Mubadala explores investments in Morocco's green hydrogen and ammonia production plants in February 2025.
The Morocco-Nigeria gas pipeline project receives $100 million in feasibility study funding from ADFD in mid-2024.
DP World announces plans for a major logistics free zone in Casablanca by late 2025.
OCP Group and ADNOC strengthen their sulfur supply agreement to support global fertilizer production in June 2025.
